[Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 4/21 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Mari (Pop Idol), 3★ Sakurako (Pop Idol)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 4/21 (Tue) After Maintenance – 4/28 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
